name: Credit Corp Group Limited
analysis: CCP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$12.2600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.2600, stop A$10.7712, target A$13.8868 (1.09:1) — then trail it.
